items.title: AI chip boom lifts Samsung profits by 1,800%
items.summary: It comes as demand for semiconductors continues to outstrip supplies, which has pushed up prices.

items.title: Trump Wanted a U.S. Soccer Star to Play in the World Cup. FIFA Found a Way.
items.summary: There was nothing unusual about a call from President Trump or the reversal of Folarin Balogun’s suspension, said the president of FIFA, Gianni Infantino.
